metadata.name: obsidian-digest
metadata.summary: obsidian-digest: Superpower your notes with Gemini 2

functions.name: obsidian_digest.obsidian_digest_cli.list_all_files
documentation:
Lists all files in the given directory and its subdirectories.
Args:
    directory (str): The root directory path to start searching from
Returns:
    list: A list of tuples containing (file_path, last_modified_time)

functions.name: obsidian_digest.obsidian_digest_cli.list_recently_modified_files
documentation:
Lists files modified within the specified number of hours in the directory
and its subdirectories.
Args:
    directory (str): The root directory path to start searching from
    hours (int): Number of hours to look back (default is 1)
Returns:
    list: A list of tuples containing (file_path, last_modified_time)

functions.name: obsidian_digest.obsidian_digest_cli.upload_to_gemini
documentation:
Uploads the given file to Gemini.

See https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/prompting_with_media

functions.name: obsidian_digest.obsidian_digest_cli.wait_for_files_active
documentation:
Waits for the given files to be active.

Some files uploaded to the Gemini API need to be processed before they can be
used as prompt inputs. The status can be seen by querying the file's "state"
field.

This implementation uses a simple blocking polling loop. Production code
should probably employ a more sophisticated approach.
